markdown.markdown:
I'm Chris Lake, a data scientist specializing in causal inference and experimentation. I architect and lead rigorous experiments on millions of users, taking end-to-end ownership of the experimental lifecycle, from proposing synthetic control frameworks for flagship product revamps to engineering automated workflows that safeguard millions in annual spend.

At Booking.com, one of the world's most sophisticated high-frequency experimentation environments, I lead experimental design for flagship products and bridge the gap between complex data infrastructure and high-impact business decisions.

I'm looking for a challenge where I can lead impactful deep-dives that define a company's technical roadmap.

## Technical Skills

**Causal & Statistical Methods**
Causal Inference · Synthetic Control · Difference-in-Differences · Regression Discontinuity · A/B Testing · Hypothesis Testing · Power Analysis · MDE Estimation · Multi-Linear Regression

**Machine Learning**
Predictive Modeling · XGBoost · scikit-learn

**Languages & Tools**
Python · SQL · dbt · Spark · Snowflake · AWS · Tableau · GitLab

## Contact

- Email: [lake.christopher.a@gmail.com](mailto:lake.christopher.a@gmail.com)
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/lake-chris](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lake-chris)
- GitHub: [github.com/chris-lake](https://github.com/chris-lake)

At Booking.com, one of the world's most sophisticated high-frequency experimentation environments, I lead experimental design for flagship products and bridge the gap between complex data infrastructure and high-impact business decisions.
